message:
perf(mvcc): wal_offset SeqCst → AcqRel for monotonic counter consistency

Both `compat_commit` and `compat_commit_batch` advance `wal_offset` via
`fetch_add(SeqCst)` while holding the `commit_page_index` write lock.
The lock already provides total ordering across commit batches, so
SeqCst was the only outlier in the commit-counter cluster.

`AcqRel` matches the pattern just landed for `allocate_commit_seq`
(5e52c9bf), `Connection::next_commit_seq` in fsqlite-core, and
`CommitSequenceCombiner::next_commit_seq` in commit_combiner.rs. No
production reader observes `wal_offset` outside the lock, so the
weakened ordering is functionally equivalent — purely a normalization.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
